question: Why do you want to join our company?
What are your strengths and weaknesses?
Describe a situation where you had to work in a team.
How do you handle stress or pressure?
Tell me about a time when you faced a conflict in a team. How did you handle it?
Describe a situation where you had to meet a tight deadline.
Give an example of a time you showed leadership.
Tell me about a mistake you made and how you handled it.
Describe a situation where you had to learn something quickly.
Tell me about a time you failed. What did you learn from it?
Describe a situation where you had to take a difficult decision with limited information.
How would you handle a situation where your manager disagrees with your idea?
Tell me about a time you went above and beyond your responsibilities.
Describe a challenging situation where you had to adapt quickly to change.
